deterministic_issues.text: Verb 'Дякую' (VESUM: verb:imperf:pres:s:1) in pre-verb module M4. Verbs are forbidden before M15.
deterministic_issues.fix: Replace verb 'Дякую' with an English equivalent or a noun phrase. Students haven't learned verbs yet.

deterministic_issues.text: Imperative 'Будь' (VESUM: verb:imperf:impr:s:2) — imperatives not taught until M47.
deterministic_issues.fix: Replace 'Будь' with English instruction. E.g., use 'Remember that...' instead of Ukrainian imperatives.
